Microsoft’s & Apple’s coding tools will be ‘dead soon,': Creator of Antrophic's AI coding tool
description: Boris Cherny, creator of Claude Code, predicts traditional coding tools like VS Code and Xcode will soon be obsolete. He believes AI agents will soon handle entire development workflows, rendering current IDEs unnecessary. This shift will redefine software engineers into 'builders' who orchestrate AI, requiring adaptability and early experimentation from professionals.

US arms crunch? Iran war strains Pentagon, delays shipments to Nato allies
description: America's military supplies are stretched thin.  Deliveries of weapons to European nations face delays.  This is due to ongoing conflicts in the Middle East and support for Ukraine.  European allies are concerned about their defense readiness.  The situation highlights global demand on US arms production.  This could impact alliances and defense strategies.

Jharkhand JAC Class 9 result 2026 released: Direct link to download scorecards
description: The Jharkhand Academic Council has declared the JAC Class 9 result 2026, with an overall pass percentage of 99.17%. Over 4.06 lakh students cleared the exam, with girls slightly outperforming boys. Most districts recorded above 98% results, reflecting strong performance. Students can check scores online or via SMS using their roll details.
